top_signals.title: Baltic Dry Index climbs to 2717 up 67 points
top_signals.summary: Today, Friday, July 03 2026, the Baltic Dry Index climbed 67 points, reaching 2717 points. Baltic Dry Index is compiled by the London-based Baltic Exchange and covers prices for transported cargo such as coal, grain and iron ore. The index is based on a daily survey of agents all over the world. Baltic Dry hit ...
